utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes five items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan lists all five of these items. Each one includes the necessary details: provider/type, costs (monthly and annual), and benefits or coverage descriptions. Health coverage includes both physical and mental aspects with costs. Property coverage specifies home/contents insurance with costs. Travel coverage specifies travel insurance with costs. Additional services section includes enhancements with costs (dependents, income protection, life/key person). Total budget includes monthly and annual totals. Therefore, all items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists several categories: health_coverage (PrimeCare, Global Executive Health & Wellness), property_coverage (Premium Executive Property Insurer, Executive-tier home, contents and equipment coverage), travel_coverage (PrimeTravel, Executive global travel and family plan), and additional_services (PrimeCare + PrimeTravel dependent plan, PrimeCare PC-INCOME-001 income protection, ExecutiveGlobal Platinum life/key-person coverage). From the ground-truth ratings, 'PrimeCare' corresponds to the 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' in both physical and mental health, each rated 10. The property coverage matches the premium level of 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' (rating 10). The travel coverage from 'PrimeTravel' corresponds to 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' (rating 10). The dependent coverage uses PrimeCare + PrimeTravel, both rated 10, so the combined should also be 10. The income protection plan ('PrimeCare (PC-INCOME-001)') is not explicitly rated, but aligns with PrimeCare Premium quality (rating 10). The life/key-person coverage from 'ExecutiveGlobal Platinum' matches the premium executive-level life coverage category, which consistently holds a top rating, so 10. Therefore, all mapped items correspond to their closest equivalents in the ground-truth with rating 10.
